---
title: About
date: today
---

Care-giving for this analysis is defined very broadly and encompasses a range of activities. These may include running errands, managing household responsibilities such as shopping, or escorting individuals.

For this analysis, care is filtered for the following trip purposes: 

- Escort 
- Shopping
- Meal
- Personal Business/Errand/Appointment

All `HOME` trips are excluded.

Analysis queue:
